user.title: Orange Romania
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Orange account.

password.title: Log in with username & password
password.description: Enter your My Orange credentials. Note: Orange protects its login with reCAPTCHA, so this may be rejected — if it is, go back and use the session cookie method instead.

cookie.title: Log in with a session cookie
cookie.description: Log in at {url} in your browser, open DevTools → Network, click any `myaccount/api` request, and copy the full **Cookie** request header. Paste it below.

reauth.title: Orange Romania — sign in again
reauth.description: Your Orange session expired. Choose how to re-authenticate (the cookie method is the most reliable).

reauth_password.title: Orange Romania — re-enter credentials
reauth_password.description: Enter your My Orange credentials. If reCAPTCHA blocks this, go back and use the session cookie method instead.

reauth_cookie.title: Orange Romania session expired
reauth_cookie.description: Your Orange session cookie expired. Log in again, copy a fresh **Cookie** header and paste it below.

error.invalid_auth: That cookie did not resolve to a logged-in Orange session. Make sure you copied the full Cookie header while logged in.
error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Orange API. Check your connection and try again.

abort.already_configured: This Orange account is already configured.
